chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-865 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.4098/2020 (stay). 3. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 15.01.2024 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The record shows that the petitioner’s counsel is not regular and punctual in appearance, as he was called absent on the last date that is 10.11.2022 and also on the previous date that is 29.09.2022. Even today no one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioner and there is no intimation either. The petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
